headline: Can Kimberly-Clark's Innovation Strategy Boost Sales Growth?
summary: KMB is driving growth through science-backed innovation, supporting market share gains and stronger volume growth.

headline: Church & Dwight (CHD) Stock Still Looks Pricey Despite Its 16% Five Year Return
summary: Church & Dwight stock sits at US$95.41, with the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate suggesting meaningful upside while traditional earnings multiples point to a richer valuation, leaving investors with a clear split in the signals. Over the past 5 years, Church & Dwight has returned 16.4%, which is a moderate outcome for long term holders weighing whether the current price still offers a margin of comfort. Steady cash generation from household brands can support the...
